name: PT Kedawung Setia Industrial Tbk
summary: PT Kedawung Setia Industrial Tbk, together with its subsidiary, manufactures and sells enamel products in Indonesia. The company offers enamel houseware, corrugated carton boxes, and egg tray boxes. It also exports its products. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Surabaya, Indonesia. PT Kedawung Setia Industrial Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Kitasubur Utama.
